title: Create 20 Infographics/Images for Amazon Product Listing
desc: Hi, I need a graphic designer who specialises in infographics to produce 20 images for our Amazon listing. So, images that target people shopping on Amazon. Our product is a natural probiotic for ponds and lakes that helps reduce muck, improves water clarity, and eradicates odor (by ramping up populations of beneficial bacteria). I've included 'Examples' of images I like. Our images should be this quality in design but matched to our brand. To apply, please send graphic design examples closely matched to what we are looking for, e.g. infographics, Amazon/e-store focused. If you have created images for Amazon before, this is a bonus. Please also include a quote on the project. Thanks

title: Ecommerce Product Photo Editor
desc: I’m looking for a highly skilled product photo editor/retoucher for a Shopify product website. The product is a pregnancy pillow, so accuracy is extremely important. I need someone who is excellent with color correction and color matching, especially fabric colors. The editor must be able to keep the product’s exact shape, size, seams, logo tag placement, and texture intact while improving the photo quality. Tasks may include smoothing wrinkles, correcting fabric color, cleaning backgrounds, making images look premium, and creating polished Shopify-ready product images. Please only apply if you have strong experience with e-commerce product retouching, fabric color matching, and Shopify/Amazon-style product images. Please include before-and-after examples.

title: Elegant Furniture Catalog Design PDF
desc: I need a polished digital PDF catalog that showcases my full furniture line—more than eleven categories in total. I’ll send you a reference catalog that captures the mood I like, but the finished piece should lean toward a classic, elegant look of its own. The job covers everything from setting up a refined layout with clear category breaks and a clean hierarchy of headings, to flowing in product photos, descriptions, dimensions, finishes, and pricing tables. Please balance generous white space with tasteful typography so the pages feel luxurious yet easy to scan. Once the creative direction is locked, you can work in Adobe InDesign (preferred) or another professional layout tool, as long as you deliver: • A press-ready, high-resolution PDF (RGB for screen, with a separate CMYK variant if adjustments are minimal). • The packaged source files, including fonts and linked images, so future updates stay straightforward. I will supply high-res images, copy, and any brand assets you need. Let me know your typical turnaround for the first draft and how many revision rounds you include, and we’ll get started right away.

title: Graphic Designer
desc: VENTEK is an Australian e-commerce brand selling premium reusable ice, a no-gel, no-slime alternative to single-use servo ice bags. We're a lean, fast-moving startup with a growing customer base, an active Shopify store, and live Meta ad campaigns running daily. We have a clear brand identity: navy, blue, and white, bold condensed typography, and an honest, no-BS tone. Everything we put out should look sharp, consistent, and credible — not over-designed, not generic. What You'll Be Working On We need a reliable part-time designer to help us produce visual assets on an ongoing basis. The core work is: Meta ad creatives (static image ads for Facebook and Instagram) Product page and website graphics Organic social content (Instagram/Facebook posts and story frames) Retail pitch materials and one-pagers (occasional) UGC-style ad templates for creators to use This is ongoing, part-time work. We're not looking for a one-project freelancer — we want someone who learns the brand and becomes a reliable part of the team. What We're Looking For Strong portfolio with e-commerce, DTC, or product brand work Proficient in Canva, Figma, or Adobe Creative Suite (tell us what you use) Good eye for typography and layout — conversion-focused, not just pretty Can follow a brand guide and produce cons

title: Graphic Designer Needed to Recreate 7 High-Quality Product Page Hero Images
desc: Job Description We are looking for an experienced graphic designer to recreate 7 hero/banner images for our product pages. The goal is to maintain the same overall style, format, and premium look as the existing images while adapting them to our brand. Scope of Work Recreate 7 existing hero images. Keep the overall layout, visual style, and professional appearance similar. Update backgrounds to match our products and branding. Apply our brand colors consistently throughout the designs. Make small layout adjustments where appropriate (e.g., repositioning certain elements while keeping the overall concept intact). Ensure all images are highly branded, visually appealing, and optimized for e-commerce/product pages. Deliver high-resolution, professional-quality assets. What We Provide Our existing mockups and product assets. Brand colors and branding guidelines. Reference images showing the style we want to replicate. Requirements Strong experience in graphic design, e-commerce design, and product page visuals. Excellent skills in Photoshop, Illustrator, Figma, or similar design tools. Ability to create premium, conversion-focused designs. Attention to detail and consistency. Ability to work quickly and communicate clearly. Timeline This project is urgent, and we would like to comple

title: Graphic Designer and Social Media Strategist
desc: Hi there, we're looking for a freelance Graphic Designer to create high-converting visual assets for Amazon, Shopify, and other eCommerce platforms. At FLS, we help purpose-driven brands thrive on Amazon. We’re not your average agency, we move fast, work smart, and deeply care about results. Our clients are high-integrity companies that create amazing products, and we support them by driving meaningful growth through strategy, advertising, and operational excellence. This is a freelance role starting at 7-10 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into a larger part-time role and eventually full-time for the right person. Responsibilities: * Create Amazon listing images and product infographics. * Design Amazon A+ Content. * Create lifestyle images and product-focused creative assets. * Design banners and website graphics for Shopify stores. * Create presentation decks and marketing collateral when needed. * Maintain consistent branding across multiple client accounts. * Manage projects independently and meet deadlines. * Collaborate with the CEO and Executive Assistant while taking ownership of execution. Requirements: * 2+ years of Graphic Design experience. * Strong Adobe Photoshop skills (required). * Experience with Canva and Figma. * Native or fluent English. * Integri

title: Graphic designer - advertising creatives
desc: We are looking for a graphic designer to create high-performing Meta (Facebook & Instagram) ad creatives for DONE. The work will include creating static ad creatives, promotional graphics, and multiple creative variations for testing across our paid social campaigns. We are looking for someone who: * Has experience designing ad creatives for e-commerce brands * Understands performance-focused design and paid social advertising * Can create clean, modern, and conversion-focused visuals * Is comfortable working from existing brand guidelines * Can communicate and collaborate through Slack We are looking for a long-term collaboration and would like a designer who can support us with ongoing creative requests as we launch new campaigns, products, and promotions. When applying, please share examples of Meta ads, social media advertising creatives, or e-commerce design work that you have created.

title: High-Converting Instagram/Social Media Reel Ad for Single Hero Product - Bangalore only -- 2
desc: I am launching a paid-traffic campaign on social media (Instagram/Facebook) for a single hero product and need a skilled video creator/editor to produce a high-converting, 15 to 30-second advertisement Reel. The sole objective of this video is to grab attention in the first 3 seconds, build strong product desire, and compel viewers to click the "Shop Now" button to visit our Shopify landing page. Note: The website is purely for building final buying confidence and checkout—the Reel must do all the heavy lifting to inspire the customer. Key Deliverables: The Core Ad Reel (15–30 seconds): Optimized for 9:16 vertical mobile viewing. It must feature a powerful dynamic hook, a clear product demonstration/problem-solving angle, and a strong "Shop Now" Call to Action at the end. 2–3 Hook Variations: Minor edits of the first 3 seconds of the video so I can A/B test which opening grabs the most attention on paid ads. Requirements & Creative Guidelines: Must feel native to Instagram/TikTok trends (clean aesthetic, smooth transitions, engaging text overlays, and sync to trending/energetic audio beats). The video should focus heavily on the product’s core benefits and a visual "wow factor" rather than just listing features. High-quality editing, color grading, and crisp pacing.

title: Infographic designer
desc: We are an e-commerce brand looking for an experienced graphic designer who specializes in creating high-converting Product Listing Images (for Amazon/Wayfair/etc.). We don't just want basic photo cropping; we need someone who understands how to take a raw product photo and turn it into a visual sales page that converts visitors into buyers. i need lifestyle images and infographic images This is a remote position. We are looking for an ongoing relationship as we launch new products.

title: Lightroom Classic Expert for High-End Product Photo Masking, Color Balancing & Alignment (45 Images)
desc: We are looking for a meticulous Lightroom Classic expert to assist with a product photography project for an upscale e-commerce stationery brand. The project consists of 45 commercial listing images shot tethered in Lightroom Classic. The images feature various sized, gray suede-covered boxes on a gray suede background, using blank dummy cards as placeholders. Because of lighting and exposure shifts during the shoot, we need the background and boxes balanced perfectly across all images to match a provided "Hero" sample shot. Furthermore, some of the boxes shifted slightly during the shoot and need to be digitally straightened. - Crucial Project Requirements: Instead of destructive editing or standard global adjustments, you will be utilizing Lightroom Classic's native tools so that we can retain full editability for the future. For every image, you will need to complete two main phases: PHASE 1: GEOMETRY & REALIGNMENT * Use Lightroom’s Transform panel (Guided Upright, Rotate, Aspect, etc.) to perfectly straighten the boxes, fix any minor lens distortion, and ensure lines are square and professional across all 45 frames. PHASE 2: ADVANCED PRECISE MASKING Create three distinct, highly accurate local adjustment masks. **CRITICAL NOTE: Some shots include styling props (e.g., a simple

title: Minimalist Instagram Sales Poster
desc: I’ll supply high-resolution product photos and the exact copy; what I need is a single, sales-focused Instagram poster that feels minimalistic and clean. Think ample white space, clear hierarchy, and one strong call-to-action that nudges viewers to purchase. A few specifics to keep in mind: • Format: 1080 × 1080 (square) for the main feed, created in Canva or Photoshop so I can edit text later if needed. • Tone: understated elegance—no busy patterns, just crisp typography and a subtle accent color that draws the eye to the CTA. • Target: users scrolling on Instagram; visuals should pop on both light and dark mode. Deliverables 1. Editable source file (Canva link or layered PSD). 2. Exported PNG ready for upload. Once I hand over images, logo, and copy, I’d like the first draft within 48 hours and final tweaks wrapped up shortly after. Let’s create a poster that turns casual scrollers into customers.

title: PPC looking for a High-Performing Graphic/Video Creatives
desc: Hey Group! We’re a ppc agency — a lean, fast-paced growth team serving global eCommerce and service brands. We’re looking for a graphic design assistant who can grow with us into a creative lead role. You’ll start by helping us create static ad creatives, banners, social content, and landing page visuals. If you’re reliable, detail-oriented, and hungry to level up, we’ll teach you how to build high-performing creatives that convert. ✅ You should: Be familiar with Canva or Figma Be able to follow a brief and turn around graphics quickly Be available for weekly deliverables and responsive on Slack Bonus: You know/love testing hooks, colors, formats, and working with marketing data 🚫 Not a good fit if: You need someone to hand-hold every step You disappear during the week with no updates You don’t care how well your designs actually perform 📈 This is a great fit if: You want to work with an international team You love creating, not just designing You’re looking for long-term growth (this can turn into a lead role in 2–3 months if you prove yourself) Apply here Let’s build something great together!

title: Packaging & Instruction Manual Design
desc: Packaging & Instruction Manual Design – DIY Smartwatch (Brand Licensed Product) We're looking for a skilled graphic/print designer to create the retail packaging (box) and instruction manual (booklet) for a new DIY smartwatch product. The product hardware and 3D design are already finalized — we now need the printed materials that ship with it, designed to match our brand licensing guidelines. What we need: - Design retail box packaging (dieline-ready artwork for all panels: front, back, sides, top, bottom) - Design an instruction manual / booklet (assembly steps, usage, safety info, specs) - Match brand licensing guidelines (colors, logos, typography, layout, tone) - Deliver clean, print-ready files in agreed formats What we provide: - Brand guidelines and licensing requirements - Vector assets, logos, and reference materials - Product photos/renders, technical specifications, and manual content (text, diagrams, step list) - Box dimensions and dieline template (or specs to build one) Requirements: - Strong portfolio of retail packaging and/or print collateral, ideally consumer electronics - Print production knowledge (dielines, bleed, CMYK, die-cuts, finishes) - Ability to design instructional/technical layouts that are clear and easy to follow - Ability to match a defined brand

title: Packaging Box Designer needed for 32oz Stainless Steel Water Bottle — Adventure Brand
desc: National Parks adventure brand selling laser-engraved stainless steel water bottles paired with collectible sticker sets covering all 63 U.S. National Parks. We need a packaging designer to create a retail-ready box for our bottle. The product: — 32oz stainless steel double-wall vacuum insulated bottle — Box must fit and protect the bottle + 2 included lids Box specifications: — Size: 12 × 4 × 4 inches — Style: TBD with designer (tuck-top, rigid, sleeve, etc.) — Print-ready, CMYK, 300 dpi with bleed — Dieline + final artwork files required — Layered .ai or .psd source files What we need: — Custom dieline for the box structure — Full artwork design for all panels (front, back, sides, top, bottom) — Brand-aligned visual design featuring National Parks theme — Retail-ready — must look premium on a shelf and as a gift — Up to 2 revision rounds — Full creative brief shared upon hiring Style direction: — Adventurous, premium, gift-worthy — Earth tones, nature-inspired — consistent with our brand — Should feel like opening the box is part of the experience You're a great fit if you: — Have a portfolio with retail or e-commerce product packaging — Understand print production for packaging (dielines, bleed, CMYK, coating) — Have experience with structural packaging or work with a structur

title: Packaging Design for Ecom Product
desc: I need someone to help me design packaging for an e-commerce product. The project involves creating both an external package design and a design for the internal wrappers. The ideal candidate should have experience in packaging design and be able to deliver high-quality designs that align with our brand's vision.

title: Photo Editor Needed – Background Removal & Replacement (No AI Tools)
desc: We are a luxury florist based in London looking for a skilled photo editor to work on our product photography on an ongoing basis. --- 🔧 THE JOB We have professional bouquet and flower arrangement photos that need their backgrounds removed and replaced with clean, consistent backgrounds suited to a luxury brand website. --- ✅ WHAT WE NEED • Remove existing backgrounds from flower/bouquet photos • Replace with clean, neutral, or specified backgrounds • Maintain the full integrity of every flower — no alterations to arrangements whatsoever • Deliver high-resolution, web-ready files • Consistent editing style across all images --- ❌ IMPORTANT — PLEASE READ BEFORE APPLYING • NO AI tools to be used (no Photoshop AI, no Remove.bg, no Firefly, no generative fill) • Manual selection/masking only (pen tool, manual masking) • Do NOT alter, retouch, add to, or remove any flowers or foliage from the arrangements • Do NOT change colours of flowers We will ask for a small paid test before committing to a larger project. --- 🎯 IDEAL CANDIDATE • Strong Photoshop skills with experience in manual masking/clipping paths • Experience editing product or floral photography • High attention to detail — flowers have delicate petals and fine edges • Able to handle soft, wispy edges (ribbon, petals, folia

title: Picture Design Advertisements for E-commerce
desc: I need someone to create picture design advertisements for my e-commerce store that will be used on social media for ads. The ideal candidate should have experience in creating visually appealing and effective social media ads. The job requires an intermediate level of proficiency in design tools and social media advertising.

title: Product Photo Background Removal
desc: I have between one and ten product shots that need their backgrounds removed cleanly. The finished files must be delivered as high-resolution PNGs with full transparency—no stray pixels, halos, or color fringing. Consistency across the set is crucial because these images will be used in an e-commerce catalog. Please keep each image at its original resolution and color profile; I’ll handle any resizing afterward. A layered PSD alongside the transparent PNGs would be a welcome extra, although not mandatory. Speed matters, but precision matters more. Let me know your expected turnaround time and the tools you’ll use (Photoshop, Affinity Photo, or similar). I’ll inspect every edge at 100 % zoom, so clean masks and intact product details are the acceptance criteria. Deliverables • 1–10 product images with backgrounds removed, supplied as transparent PNGs • Optional: corresponding layered PSD files for future edits If that fits your skill set and schedule, I’m ready to get started right away.
